title: Super Mario Bros. 1, 2, 3 Corrupts
description: This is my very first SMB corruption video, which was uploaded around February 2007 on my first youtube account. I know this ain't that great compared to my other corruption videos, but this is slightly funny in my opinion. The 10 corruption results were not used by game genie codes, but a little utility tool that I've used before to corrupt games called "CORRUPT." CORRUPT had the tool to alter the game's data in a way that creates variety of numerous random glitches, but most of iterations end up a sudden freeze. You get the tool from a site called Zophar.
